sidebar.title: Miliastra Toolbox
sidebar.clearHint: Tip: Please clean up unwanted conversations in time
sidebar.confirmClearAll: Clear all conversation history? This cannot be undone.
sidebar.toolkitDesc: View all tool entries and tutorials

chat.title: Knowledge Q&A
chat.greeting: Hello! I'm the Miliastra Knowledge Assistant. How can I help you?
chat.autoSaveHint: Conversations are saved locally in your browser. Please delete them in time.
chat.contextHint: Reducing context turns in the bottom-left menu can speed up generation.
chat.configRequiredHint: Click the "LLM Config" button below to configure (or check the free model).
chat.statusEngineReady: Chat engine ready, searching knowledge base...
chat.timeoutWarning: No response for 5 minutes. The question may be too complex. Try reducing context turns, using a non-reasoning model, or starting a new chat in a new tab.
chat.connectionError: Connection error: {{detail}}. If this persists, the model may have hit its limit or the config is wrong. Please check LLM config.
chat.agentModeTitle: Enable smart mode for deep Q&A with tool calls
chat.imageTooltip: Only some multimodal models support image input
chat.inputPlaceholder: Enter question / paste image; AI answers are for reference only, subject to official docs.
chat.imageTooLarge: Image still larger than 1MB after compression. Please choose a smaller image.
chat.footer: Official Miliastra docs and related info are copyrighted by miHoYo. This site is a personal project and is not affiliated with miHoYo.

config.title: LLM Config (stored in browser only, not saved on server)
config.useDefaultModel: Use free model (limited, may be poor quality / used for provider training, recommend bringing your own LLM service)
config.channelLabel: Channel (only channel 1 supports images, but resources are limited, use as needed)

tools.title: Tools
tools.intro: Directly call the Miliastra knowledge skill API for structured node queries, document content retrieval, and document title search. Input supports comma, Chinese comma, semicolon, or newline for batch calls.
tools.nodeSubtitle: Suitable when you know node names, or want to query multiple nodes with fuzzy keywords.
tools.documentSubtitle: Enter document title or system keyword to view full text and related nodes.
tools.titleSubtitle: See what documents are available before fetching full text or asking in chat.
tools.enterNodeName: Please enter at least one node name
tools.enterDocumentTitle: Please enter at least one document title or keyword
tools.enterDocumentKeyword: Please enter at least one document keyword
tools.documentResultEmpty: Document content results will appear here.
tools.titleResultEmpty: Title search results will appear here.
tools.batchInputHint: Supports comma, Chinese comma, semicolon, or newline for batch input
tools.documentCountHint: Recommended to enter 1-3 topics at a time for readable results
tools.titleSearchHint: Suitable for filtering when exact document name is unknown

svg.title: SVG Docs
svg.selectFromToc: Select a chart from the left TOC to view

notes.title: Notes
notes.imagePlaceholder: Upload images via the image hosting feature
notes.videoPlaceholder: Enter a Bilibili video link related to Miliastra
notes.alreadyLiked: You have already liked this note

data.title: Data Query
data.translateDesc: Query 15-language translations by Chinese term. Exact matches are prioritized; up to 10 results returned.
data.translatePlaceholder: Enter a Chinese term, e.g.: blacklist
data.enterKeyword: Please enter a Chinese term keyword
data.enterIdOrName: Please enter ID or Chinese name
data.idOrNameHint: Enter either ID or Chinese name; ID takes priority if both provided.

uploader.title: Image Host
uploader.configRequired: Please check default config, or configure your own Tencent COS service to continue (custom support coming later)
uploader.dropHere: Click to select or drag image here
